# Catalog.FindByFacet method

FR-C20 P2b — discover assets of a kind carrying a categorical facet (e.g. every ParagonGlyph with `class=Barbarian`). Computes [`Facets`](./Facets.md) per asset (decodes where the facet requires it), so scope with *kind*.
